creator: ben@ben.tapehouse.net
text:
When I type "?" at the boot: prompt, I'm unable to see the output, because
the boot help causes it to scroll off the top of the screen.

Fix: 

Don't repeat the boot help after a "?".  Either add a help option, so that
help can be requested explicitly, or build in a minimal pager if there's
room.
How-To-Repeat: 
At the boot: prompt, type "?" and hit return.
